stemHtml: You have to evacuate the passengers for a non-immediate issue. The crew must ensure (1) _____. Subsequently they must (2) _____ then they must (3) _____.

options.a: (1) Seat belts are unfastened, and the crowd is controlled (2) confirm the outside area is safe and open the appropriate doors / exits (3) evacuate the passengers
options.b: (1) Doors and exits are opened immediately (2) don rescue equipment (3) evacuate the passengers
options.c: (1) Passengers stand up and move to the exits (2) open all exits (3) collect rescue equipment
options.d: (1) Rescue equipment is donned first (2) control the crowd (3) brief the passengers
